title: Blepharitis - NHS
text:
auses of blepharitis 
Blepharitis can be caused by:
a type of bacteria that lives on the skin a skin condition, such as seborrhoeic dermatitis the glands inside the eyelids not producing enough oil Blepharitis cannot be spread to other people.
Page last reviewed: 12 June 2025
Next review due: 12 June 2028
